overall.description: A slow panoramic sweep through a cozy, rustic cottage interior rendered in a game engine, featuring a crackling stone fireplace, wooden furniture, and a window revealing a dark night sky. The high-quality lighting and textures create an atmospheric, warm living space.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage living area with stone fireplace

events.description: window revealing night sky becomes visible on left side, introducing cool blue light

black copper kettle sitting by the fire
wooden shelf above fireplace with pottery and items
large patterned rug with red and green geometric designs on wooden floor

dried herbs and plants hanging from ceiling beams
simple wooden chair near left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy cottage interior dominated by a warm stone fireplace on the right. The camera slowly pans left, revealing wooden furniture, a patterned rug, and dried herbs hanging from the ceiling. Around the 6-second mark, a window showing the night sky becomes visible on the left, introducing cool blue light that mixes with the fire's warm glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: cottage living area with fireplace and night window view

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left, revealing the wooden dining area near the window and wall decorations

entered.detail: multi-paned wooden window showing dark night sky outside
wooden dining table near the window
framed pictures and wall hangings on left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left to fully reveal a wooden window showing the night sky, along with a wooden table and chairs in the dining area. The stone fireplace remains visible on the right side of the frame while the mixed lighting creates a cozy atmosphere. The segment showcases the detailed textures of the wooden walls, furniture, and hanging decorations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a rustic cottage interior that shifts from the intense warmth of a hearth to the cool stillness of a moonlit window. It begins focused on a glowing stone fireplace on the right, slowly sweeping left to reveal a patterned rug and dried herbs hanging from the ceiling. As the camera moves, the warm orange light of the fire begins to blend with a soft blue radiance emerging from the left side of the frame. The scene then expands to fully reveal a wooden window overlooking a dark night sky, passing a dining area with a wooden table and chairs. Finally, the movement settles on the detailed textures of the wooden walls and furniture, capturing the atmospheric contrast between the interior heat and the nocturnal chill outside.
